purpose: time-sliced, regulation-aware legal status for the Champions pool

fields.name: legality_snapshot_key
fields.description: Primary key for this legality snapshot row

fields.name: regulation_code
fields.description: Regulation identifier this snapshot applies to

fields.name: is_legal
fields.description: Whether the Pokémon/form is legal under this regulation as of snapshot_date

fields.name: snapshot_date
fields.description: ISO-8601 date the legal-pool state was captured

fields.name: source_name
fields.description: Constant: PokéBase (the in-scope source that publishes real per-Pokémon regulation codes; OP.GG's Champions Pokédex page has only a single regulation-agnostic legal pool)

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Source URL or endpoint the record was resolved from

fields.name: dataset_version
fields.description: Dataset version this row was published under
